description.title: description
description.description: This is the text that describes the newly created Case. Write this as a summary of the conversation with the user and the Agent.

subject.description: This is the single line of text that describes the subject of the Case. Write this as a single sentence that describes the content of the conversation with the user and the Agent. Make this no longer than 255 characters.
